title: SOS Bus Tokens
description: Runtime-mutated token store for the SOS bus. NOT tracked in git (see .gitignore). The bus service writes this file on token mint/revoke. To recover from loss, see scripts/restore-tokens.sh or pull the latest snapshot from /tmp/tokens-snapshot-*.json.

token.description: Raw bearer token (sk-<agent>-<hex>). Stored only at mint time; production hardening should clear after first read and rely on token_hash.

token_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the raw token. Authoritative for verification.

project.description: Project scope (gaf, sos, mumega-internal, viamar, ...). null = global agent scope.

scope.description: Token scope class. agent = first-party / colony, customer = external paying, tenant = byoa/multi-tenant.

active.description: Soft-deactivate without deletion. Verify queries SHOULD filter active=true.

resurrected_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of agent re-issue (if applicable).

x-canonical-record.do_not_commit: This file is runtime state. The git working tree may diverge from the running service at any time. To re-add a missing internal agent, use sos.bus.provision.create_token() — do not edit by hand.
